title: Crosshair (Plus + Dot)
description: Changes the crosshair texture to be a plus with a dot.
body:
## Crosshair (Plus + Dot)
This resource pack changes the crosshair texture to be a plus with a dot.

_If you want to support us and our work, please consider checking out [our similar resource packs](https://modrinth.com/collection/HUeZl5Qh) or all of [our resource packs](https://modrinth.com/organization/vanilla-collective)!_

<details>
<summary>Installation</summary>

To install this resource pack, select your Minecraft version in the download menu, and copy the downloaded file into Minecraft's `resourcepacks` folder. Alternatively, if you are using the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app), you can easily add this resource pack to an instance by selecting "Install with Modrinth App" in the download menu.

For more detailed installation instructions, see the [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Loading_a_resource_pack).

</details>

<details>
<summary>Screenshots</summary>

![Screenshot 1 demonstrating Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6fWmfXYV/images/d0185cfddde6fba73ee7e36a95a1683d30f4dcd3.png)

</details>
